content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 True Publicity: Undergrad Student - Remote, Part time, flexible hours - Assistant and Content Manager Anywhere in the World Wyoming Virtual Assistant All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5744/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Boulder, Colorado <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://truepublicity.com">https://truepublicity.com</a> </p> <p>Hey guys.</p> <p> This is the perfect gig for an undergrad student </p> <ul> <li>Fully remote</li> <li>Flexible hours</li> <li>Part time - (Won't take away from your studies)</li> <li>Paid training included</li> <li>Good pay</li> </ul> <p>You'll be doing some basic virtual assistant computer work, some Wordpress / content management but it's easy to do, and training and help will be available.</p> <p>Please fill in the application form at <a href="https://tally.so/r/1A5E2l">https://tally.so/r/1A5E2l</a>&nbsp;</p> <p>Looking forward to hearing from you!</p> <p>Kind regards</p> <p>David</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager</a></p> Mon, 06 Jul 2026 10:45:59 +0000 Wed, 05 Aug 2026 10:45:59 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager Creative Force: SaaS Product Support Jedi – Remote, EMEA Anywhere in the World Berkshire SaaS Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0074/5226/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Creative Force <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.creativeforce.team/">https://www.creativeforce.team/</a> </p> <p>We’re on the hunt for a sharp, self-driven SaaS pro who’s as comfortable navigating staging environments as they are navigating human conversations.</p> <p>Our EMEA client base is growing fast and we need someone who can keep up. Our software isn’t your average plug-and-play; it has a steep learning curve so you’ll need to be technically savvy while also being the kind of person clients genuinely enjoy talking to. If you’ve got SaaS in your DNA, thrive in async/remote environments, and can juggle multiple threads without breaking a sweat — keep reading.</p> <h2>The role</h2> <p>You’ll join a lean, high-performing global support team working across two SaaS products, Award Force and Good Grants. Day to day you’ll be communicating with colleagues and clients across countries, cultures, and time zones.</p> <p>Support happens across email tickets, phone, and 1-1 Zoom calls. Once you’ve leveled up on product knowledge, you’ll run onboarding sessions and client meetings covering issue resolution, best practices, and product adoption.</p> <p>You’ll also be hands-on with bug testing and reporting, feeding considered feedback to our product teams— always pushing to make our products better.</p> <p>We have a startup mindset. We experiment with new tools, iterate on processes, and move fast. Got a great idea? Pitch it. We’re not big on bureaucracy, only results. We don’t expect you to be a slave to your chair but flexibility is a must.</p> <h2>You’ll need to tick these boxes</h2> <ul> <li><strong>You’re based in the UTC +1 or +2 timezone range.</strong>&nbsp;This is non-negotiable. Our EMEA team and clients operate in this window and we don’t allow shift work. If you live outside this range, this one’s not for you</li> <li>2+ years of professional experience, ideally in a SaaS support or client-facing role</li> <li>Native-level English fluency (bilingual? Even better!)</li> <li>Terms like HTML, CSS, JS, API, integrations, dev console, staging &amp; production environments, GitHub repos, and database queries don’t make you flinch. You don’t need to write code, but you need to get it</li> <li>You’ve got exceptional interpersonal and communication skills—written and verbal</li> <li>Client calls energise you. Four to five Zoom meetings a day? Bring it on</li> <li>You’re a natural problem solver who loves helping others untangle theirs</li> <li>Your writing is clean, well-structured, and detail-oriented</li> <li>You’re curious by nature and love learning new things</li> <li>You’re not allergic to upselling or fielding “sales-y” questions</li> <li>You’re organised and process-driven. Multiple tools for different workflows? No problem — you thrive in that setup</li> <li>You’re self-motivated and independent, but you also value being part of a tight-knit team</li> <li>Remote work isn’t just something you dabble in—it’s where you do your best work. You’ve got fast, reliable internet and a distraction-free workspace ready to go</li> </ul> <h2>Responsibilities</h2> <p><strong>Product support<br></strong></p> <ul> <li>Go deep on product knowledge through self-driven learning—become the expert</li> <li>Be the first point of contact on all inbound support via email/tickets, phone, and eventually live chat</li> <li>Run 1-1 Zoom sessions with clients for technical consultation and query resolution</li> <li>Maintain our consistently impressive first-reply-time metric (yeah, we’re proud of it)</li> <li>Provide technically accurate responses backed by hands-on testing of scenarios</li> <li>Collaborate with engineering to squash bugs and keep clients in the loop with timely updates</li> <li>Spot patterns in user issues and flag them for product improvement</li> </ul> <p><strong>Be seriously good with clients</strong></p> <ul> <li>Speed matters. Respond quickly and decisively</li> <li>Listen deeply—get to the root of the issue and own it until it’s resolved</li> <li>Treat every client interaction with genuine respect and appreciation</li> <li>Build trusting, long-term relationships rooted in honesty and transparency</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-saas-product-support-jedi-remote-emea">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-saas-product-support-jedi-remote-emea</a></p> Mon, 06 Jul 2026 09:07:40 +0000 Wed, 05 Aug 2026 09:07:40 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-saas-product-support-jedi-remote-emea https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-saas-product-support-jedi-remote-emea Hyphen Connect Limited: Lead Product Designer (Crypto Exchange) Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Malaysia </p&g
